scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev:apps: concurrently -k -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c blue,green "cd backend && PORT=3001 ./node_modules/.bin/nest start --watch" "cd frontend && ./node_modules/.bin/next dev"
scripts.dev: npm run docker:up && npm run prepare:dev && npm run free:ports && npm run dev:apps
